name: @maxxuxx/node-printer
description: Unified entry point for ESC/POS receipt printer transports (serial, network, CUPS, Windows Spooler)

scripts.prebuild:all: npm run prebuild:x64 && npm run prebuild:ia32 && npm run prebuild:arm64
scripts.prebuild:check: node -e "const { readdirSync } = require('node:fs'); const missing = ['win32-x64','win32-ia32','win32-arm64'].filter((arch) => { try { return !readdirSync('prebuilds/' + arch).some((file) => file.endsWith('.node')); } catch { return true; } }).map((arch) => 'prebuilds/' + arch + '/*.node'); if (missing.length) { console.error('Missing winspool prebuilds:\n' + missing.join('\n')); process.exit(1); }"
